title: GigaAM Multilingual: Foundation Model for Underrepresented Languages
innovation_summary: GigaAM Multilingual: Foundation Model for Underrepresented Languages: Crucially, we introduce a cluster-level data balancing strategy during pre-training and a domain-aware sampling method during fine-tuning to mitigate head-language dominance.
